reference: I have recently experienced episodes of what doctors call vertigo. I get dizziness, headache, and nausea. I suddenly realize the feeling comes back after wearing a tight headband. When I do not wear it, the symptoms go away, and after a few weeks, I put it on again. When I feel that it is a bit tight at noon, I take it off, and I start feeling dizzy. The next day, I am in full swing with the symptoms. Is it possible that the pressure on my skull is causing a lack of oxygen?
text: I have recently experienced episodes of what doctors call vertigo. I get dizziness, headache, and nausea. I suddenly realize the feeling comes back after wearing a tight headband. When I do not wear it, the symptoms go away. And after a few weeks, I put it on again. When I feel that it is a bit tight at noon, I take it off and I start feeling dizzy. The next day, I am in full swing with the symptoms. Is it possible that the pressure on my skull is causing the lack of oxygen?
